menuItems.name: Sarawak Laksa
menuItems.description: Our signature creamy laksa broth with sambal belacan, coconut milk, egg, and chicken. A true taste of Sarawak.

menuItems.name: Mee Kolok (Kolo Mee)
menuItems.description: Springy egg noodles tossed in shallot oil, served with soup on the side. Choose your topping.

menuItems.name: Vegetarian Kolo Mee
menuItems.description: Kolo Mee served with fresh vegetables — perfect for vegetarians.

menuItems.name: Kolo Kueh Tiaw
menuItems.description: Flat rice noodles (kueh tiaw) tossed kolo-style with shallot oil and your choice of topping.

menuItems.name: Beehoon Belacan
menuItems.description: Vermicelli noodles stir-fried with pungent sambal belacan. Available with or without telur padi (century egg).

menuItems.name: Mee Jawa Sarawak
menuItems.description: Yellow noodles in a thick, rich gravy made from sweet potato and beef stock, topped with tofu puffs, half egg, and fried shallots.

menuItems.name: Tomato Crispy Mee
menuItems.description: Crispy noodles in a rich tomato seafood gravy, topped with prawns and squid. A popular Sarawak favourite.

menuItems.name: Kacangma
menuItems.description: Traditional Hakka chicken dish cooked with ginger and motherwort herb. Earthy, aromatic, and best enjoyed with white rice.

menuItems.name: Teochew Oyster Omelette
menuItems.description: Classic Teochew-style oyster omelette — crispy edges, eggy centre, fresh oysters.

menuItems.name: Teh C Peng Special (Gula Apong)
menuItems.description: SALTed's signature three-layer iced tea with evaporated milk and Sarawak palm sugar (Gula Apong). Refreshing and unique.

menuItems.name: Iced Valentine
menuItems.description: A bubbly, sweet Ribena-based iced drink. Refreshing and fun.

menuItems.name: Kopi / Teh
menuItems.description: Local Malaysian coffee or tea, served hot or iced.

menuItems.name: Air Mineral / Sirap
menuItems.description: Mineral water or sweet rose syrup drink.

menuItems.name: Fruit Cocktail Pudding
menuItems.description: Light and refreshing fruit cocktail jelly pudding — a sweet ending to your meal.

settings.value: Sarawak's Authentic Local Taste, Extra Delicious
30-1, Jalan PJU 7/16A, Mutiara Damansara, 47810 Petaling Jaya, Selangor
Tuesday – Friday: 12:00 PM – 6:00 PM | Saturday – Sunday: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM | Closed Mondays
